results.taskDescription: Fetch 20 posts; output 'highest score' AND 'most comments' as two separate sections. Tests synthesis of multiple slices from one observation.
Fetch top 15 HN posts and write a paragraph-style summary categorizing them by topic. Tests substantive synthesis from observation data.
results.output:
# Today on Hacker News

### AI/ML
Recent breakthroughs in artificial intelligence and machine learning have been making headlines. Notably, a recent article by SentinelOne reveals high-precision software sabotage 5 years before Stuxnet, highlighting the ongoing threat of cyber attacks. Additionally, Google is banking on its AI edge to catch up with cloud rivals Amazon and Microsoft.

### Hardware
A unique find among the top stories was the purchase of Friendster for $30k, a nostalgic reminder of the early days of social media. Furthermore, a blog post by Arun Ismail explores the concept of when the "cheap one is the cool one," touching on the intersection of technology and consumerism.

### Programming
For programmers, a notable find was Notepad++ for Mac, a popular text editor that has been ported to the macOS platform. Another interesting development is EvanFlow – A TDD driven feedback loop for Claude Code, showcasing the importance of testing in software development.

### Other
A thought-provoking article by The New Yorker explores what happens when your digital life vanishes, highlighting the consequences of our increasing reliance on technology. Meanwhile, a blog post by HMP Cabral discusses the fastest Linux timestamps, shedding light on the intricacies of operating system performance.
